title: The Ark Begins to Move
description: Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Luffy, Eneru, Aisa. Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Truly, an ability fit for a god...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: It's the closing act of Skypica...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What're you doing! Catch that girl!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Please get out of the way!

summary: Luffy finally pushes back toward the real fight, carrying the only natural answer to Enel’s lightning power.
